title: Cosmic Click
definition: The final moment when the universe's vibration collapses into silence, symbolized by the 'N' sound in AUM mantra.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The cosmic click is a metaphor for the end of all creation, when everything fades away into silence, like turning off a radio.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: Cosmic click refers to the final physical vibration in the AUM mantra that symbolizes the end of the manifest universe and the return to the formless, silent state.
difficulty_levels.expert: The cosmic click is a philosophical and metaphysical concept that represents the end of all phenomena as expressed by the 'N' sound in AUM mantra. It signifies impermanence and the transition from manifestation to formlessness, highlighting the cyclical nature of reality.

extra_fields.insight: The cosmic click is a profound realization of impermanence and the cycle of creation and dissolution that underlies all existence.
